paragraphs: BTC bled to $75,321, -2.60% on the day, -4.58% on the week. Total mcap shed $80B to $2.60T, breadth 2/20 with the only greens stablecoins, F&G held 28 Fear into day two. The leverage tail thinned where it had to and the regime did not change.

Perps tape MIXED on a single regime fire. BSB cleared Tier 2 DIST as funding +0.089%/8h held above the gate, pct_24h cooled under pct_7d/7 and top L/S 1.94 dropped 0.57 over 7d — smart money exiting into retail leverage. WATCH bucket carries EDEN one tick from CAP (liq pad held), BEAT cascade running on pct_4h -13.51%, GENIUS new entrant with OI +145% 7d and top L/S -0.44. Narrative-tracker map carries AI agents and DePIN at RISING 5/5 RIDE, Hyperliquid PEAK 4/5 RIDE w/ trail, RWA PEAK 5/5 RIDE w/ trail. Three RIDE narratives against a fear-28 tape — divergence holds.

AIXBT grounding stale 15 hours but the Hormuz toll-push survived the cycle without displacement. That persistence is the read — Iran's per-passage toll converts intermittent crisis into structural energy cost, 10Y above 4.5% confirms, rate cuts priced out, BTC fear-28 is the regime. ZEC tripled in the grounding artifact but cracked -9.2% on $577M intraday — XMR dropped from the lead, the run was ZEC-specific and the privacy narrative still FADE day five. RWA ATHs ($1.2B tokenized stocks, $425M tokenized ETFs) confirm structural adoption alongside a bleeding alt tape — institutional rails and retail tape decoupled.
market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · risk-off into Fear day two, narrative carriers AI/DePIN/Hyperliquid hold the RIDE side, ZEC SHORT promoted on the privacy fade, ONDO closes on invalidation breach.

current_positions.thesis_note: AI agents and DePIN both RISING 5/5 RIDE — narrative tailwind firm. Close $2.058 sits 0.39% above $2.05 invalidation. OI -3.57% 24h means late longs unwound without panic, funding repaired to flat.
current_positions.watch: $2.05 close is the line. Top L/S 1.78 holding inside the 7d band. A close below $2.05 closes the position; a hold above with OI building back re-engages ACCUMULATION on tomorrow's scan.

current_positions.thesis_note: Close $55.107 below $56 invalidation, sixth session at this band. Same session: Hyperliquid promoted Fading to Peak, AIXBT names HYPE #1 lead with $1.8M daily buybacks + Grayscale 3rd ETF filing + BHYP $30M volume, smart money L/S +0.14 over 7d. Three feeds confirm, mechanical line breaks — revise invalidation to $54 (buyback-anchored floor).
current_positions.invalidation: close below $54 (revised — original $56 breached but narrative + AIXBT + smart-money L/S all validate in same session)
current_positions.watch: $54 is the buyback floor. Top traders re-built 1.35 from below over 7d — that's the structural confirmation. A second close below $54 with smart-money L/S delta flipping back negative closes. Holding $54-56 band with the Grayscale ETF pipeline extending re-firms the multi-week thesis.

current_positions.thesis_note: Invalidation $0.41 breached by 7%. RWA narrative holds 5/5 PEAK but the carrier rotated to tokenized stocks $1.2B + ETFs $425M, not ONDO direct. AIXBT names Ondo only on the SEC tokenization-model angle — regulatory thread, not a token bid. Structural RWA story alive, vehicle wrong.

new_positions.thesis: Watchlist trigger fired: close $591 well below $620 line, sixth red session from the $667.93 peak. Privacy/ZK FADE day five in narrative-tracker, no fresh project-side catalyst. AIXBT confirms ZEC carried the run alone — XMR dropped from the lead — so the move was idiosyncratic not sector rotation. Token-movers TRENDING+DOWN MAJOR at -9.4% on $577M vol confirms the multi-day crack. Top L/S 0.76 already net short.
risks: Top L/S 0.76 net-short — trade is partially priced, bounce risk on stop-runs above $605
Privacy narrative re-fires on a sanctions or regulatory catalyst — Iran/Hormuz tape is the live carrier
AIXBT grounding still flags ZEC $200→$600+ — stale 15h artifact, but persistent attention could pull a counter-bid

watchlist.trigger: first flat-or-red 24h with funding holding above +0.08%/8h confirms DIST per perps-scan (gains-slowing gate fired today; needs a second tick to validate)
watchlist.thesis: DISTRIBUTION regime fired today — funding +0.089%/8h cleared Tier 2 gate, pct_24h +23.37% slipped under pct_7d/7 +23.83%, OI +28.88% 24h on +275.99% 7d. Top L/S 1.94 down 0.57 over 7d reads as smart money exiting into retail leverage. Token-movers [BREAKOUT][PUMP-RISK] microcap on vol/mcap 0.56.

watchlist.trigger: funding crosses +0.08%/8h with another red day OR pct_4h continues sub -5% with OI holding flat
watchlist.invalidation: close above $1.30 (yesterday's high) before trigger fires
watchlist.thesis: Yesterday's +45.93% rolled into -6.63% with pct_4h -13.51% — cascade accelerating. Liq $1.41M past p75 $937K. Top L/S 1.33 down 0.62 over 7d — smart money distribution into retail leverage. Funding +0.016%/8h still below the LONG-TRAP floor but trajectory is up. AI narrative remains carrier vehicle for bounce risk.

watchlist.trigger: second-day red with OI extending lower fires CAPITULATION-shaped flow OR funding cross +0.08%/8h with continued red
watchlist.invalidation: close above $0.72 before trigger fires (today's intraday high)
watchlist.thesis: New universe entrant. OI +144.77% 7d on range 71.93% — fresh, volatile leverage build. Top L/S 1.29 down 0.44 over 7d — smart money fading the Binance listing pump. Vol 1.36x second-highest in today's universe. Today's token-call fires HIGH 9/10 LONG on the same name (Binance listing + relative strength against red majors) — cross-feed disagreement is the loudest signal: perps positioning reads long-trap, token-call reads listing catalyst. Watchlist pending the perps-side confirmation.

watchlist.trigger: taker buy clean through 52% with OI continuing to build OR pct_24h breaks +10% with funding holding under +0.02%/8h
watchlist.invalidation: close below $250 (revised — original $275 breached but Decentralized compute promoted Peak to Rising same session)
watchlist.thesis: Narrative-tracker PROMOTED Decentralized compute Peak to Rising today — architectural-disruptor angle (Etched, Cerebras, Tenstorrent) broadens the thesis. TAO holds tight at $263, range 15.87%, OI -3.84% 24h on flat 7d. Funding +0.003%/8h. Setup forming, no trigger.

evaluations.note: Day 2/3. -11.48% from fire. Close $2.058 sits 0.39% above $2.05 invalidation. AI agents and DePIN both RISING 5/5 RIDE — narrative re-firmed. OI -3.57% means late longs unwound without panic. Holding.

Day 2/multi-week. Close $55.107 below $56 invalidation — breach recorded. Same session: Hyperliquid promoted Fading to Peak, AIXBT names HYPE #1 lead ($1.8M daily buybacks + Grayscale 3rd ETF filing + BHYP $30M), smart money L/S +0.14 over 7d. Three-feed confluence holds as mechanical line breaks. Revising invalidation to $54 — buyback-anchored support.
Day 2/7. Invalidation $0.41 breached by 7%. RWA carrier rotated to tokenized stocks $1.2B + ETFs $425M, not ONDO direct. -17.30% return, -14.59pp vs BTC, -13.88pp vs ETH. LOSS.

close.close_reason: invalidation $0.41 breached by 7%; RWA narrative carrier rotated to tokenized stocks/ETFs, not ONDO direct

open_now.thesis: Watchlist trigger fired: close $591 below $620 line, sixth red session from $667.93 peak. Privacy/ZK FADE day five. AIXBT confirms ZEC-specific carrier — XMR dropped from lead. Token-movers TRENDING+DOWN MAJOR at -9.4% on $577M vol. Top L/S 0.76 already net short.
